description_long: This is a large, multi-level wooden cabin with a dark timber exterior and a prominent, steeply pitched gable roof. The roof is constructed from wooden shingles and features a wide overhang, with a secondary, lower roof section extending around the main structure. The cabin has numerous rectangular windows with white framing, symmetrically arranged on each visible side, and a single wooden door on the front facade. The lower portion of the building is clad in horizontal wooden planks, while the upper section is defined by its more intricate roofline and window placement. The overall appearance is robust and rustic, suggesting a traditional architectural style suited for colder climates. The structure is substantial, likely intended for residential use, and appears capable of accommodating multiple occupants.
description: A large, rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, multiple white-framed windows, and a single front door. The structure features dark timber cladding and a wide, overhanging roof.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, symmetrical window arrangement, and the layered gable roof with wide overhangs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended lower roof section, multiple windows, and the solid wooden wall construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two upper windows and a plain wooden wall with no visible doors, emphasizing the cabin's solid back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar window arrangement to the other side, showing the continuation of the lower roof and timber cladding.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof with wide overhangs and wooden shingle cladding
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple medium-sized rectangular windows with white frames, symmetrically distributed on all visible sides, with two windows on the upper rear and several on the lower levels, creating a balanced and orderly pattern.
attribute_door_placement: Single wooden door centered on the front facade beneath the main roof overhang.
